description: Easy task with explicit terminology overlap between EHR text and protocol criteria.

trials.inclusion_criteria: Adults 40-75 years with Type 2 Diabetes and HbA1c < 8.5%.
trials.exclusion_criteria: Asthma, CKD Stage 4, or active COPD exacerbation.
